rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"workflow_run triggers in kody.yml listen for a workflow named 'CI' but fail silently if ci.yml doesn't exist — the job simply never fires.","scope":"GitHub Actions"},{"kind":"decision","text":"kody.yml fix-ci-trigger job was already correctly implemented; no source changes needed there.","scope":"kody.yml"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Loop guard and bot commit guard logic lives in the @kody-ade/engine npm package, not in repo source.","scope":"@kody-ade/engine"}]}
